task_completion.description: The target task is located and selected in the project view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The task 'Set line and grade benchmarks' (row 22) is visible in the ProjectLibre task list and is clicked or highlighted.

task_completion.description: The Assign Resources dialog is opened for the target task.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A pop-up window titled 'Assign Resources' is visible, and it indicates that it is modifying the task 'Set line and grade benchmarks'.

task_completion.description: The 'G.C. Survey Crew' resource is assigned to the task.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Assign Resources dialog, 'G.C. Survey Crew' is selected and marked as assigned (e.g., checkmark or units filled), OR 'G.C. Survey Crew' appears in the 'Resource Names' column for row 22 in the main task table.

task_completion.description: The Save As dialog is opened to save the project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' or 'Save As' file browser dialog is open within ProjectLibre.

task_completion.description: The project is saved to the correct path with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Save As dialog shows the directory '/home/ga/Documents' (or 'Documents' folder) and the filename 'project.pod' before confirming the save, OR a terminal/file manager window shows the newly created 'project.pod' in the Documents folder.

integrity.description: The agent used the ProjectLibre GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the ProjectLibre application window, rather than a text editor modifying XML files directly.

integrity.description: The resource was assigned using the proper software mechanisms.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used the 'Assign Resources' tool or the specific 'Resource Names' column dropdown, rather than just typing text into an arbitrary unrelated column.

integrity.description: The file was saved using ProjectLibre's save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The save operation was performed via the ProjectLibre 'File -> Save As' menu or save icon, rather than using terminal commands to copy or create dummy files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target task is 'Set line and grade benchmarks' (UID 22). The resource to be assigned is 'G.C. Survey Crew' (UID 7). The final project must be saved to the exact path '/home/ga/Documents/project.pod'.
